title: lasianthaea guatemalensis
intro: Lasianthaea guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan Tree Daisy or Tree Daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthaea guatemalensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal infections, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and anticancer activities. Herbal preparations of Lasianthaea guatemalensis can be made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
